$comment: Chennai baseline for Taap simulator. All _source objects carry title, year, url_or_doi, and verbatim quote (or null if not directly citable). tempC is mean April maximum, the hottest month (1991-2020 climate normal). pm25 is annual mean from peer-reviewed source. canopyPct from FSI ISFR 2023. builtUpPct from MDPI remote-sensing study. waterKm2 is sum of named water bodies within the CMA bbox. vehiclesIndex is Chennai registered vehicles relative to Bangalore=100.

_source_tempC.title: Chennai Climate — climatestotravel.com
_source_tempC.quote: Based on the period 1991-2020, the average maximum temperature in April in Chennai is 36.1 °C

_source_pm25.title: Lancet Planetary Health — Annual PM2.5 concentrations in major Indian cities (via Citizen Matters)
_source_pm25.quote: Chennai's annual average PM2.5 concentration is 33.7 µg/m³ (Lancet Planetary Health research cited in Citizen Matters)

_source_canopyPct.title: India State of Forest Report 2023, Forest Survey of India

_source_builtUpPct.title: Monitoring Spatio-Temporal Dynamics in Chennai Metropolitan Area, India — MDPI Entropy
_source_builtUpPct.quote: Built-up area occupied 70.35% of the total landscape in 2016

_source_waterKm2.title: Sum of named water bodies within CMA bbox — individual Wikipedia entries and CPCB/TWAD data
_source_waterKm2.quote: Chembarambakkam ~15 km² (Wikipedia), Puzhal/Red Hills ~8 km² (estimated), Pallikaranai 695.85 ha = 6.96 km² (Wikipedia 2021), Porur ~1 km², rivers/canals/other ~5 km²; sum ≈ 36 km²

_source_vehiclesIndex.title: Number of registered motor vehicles in Chennai (Statista / CEIC, FY2020)
_source_vehiclesIndex.quote: Chennai registered vehicles ~6 million (FY2020); Bangalore ~12 million (2026). vehiclesIndex = (6/12) × 100 = 50

_source_populationM.title: Chennai Population 2026 — World Population Review
_source_populationM.quote: Chennai city proper estimated population ~7.0 million (2026)
